nodes.label: Health & Wellbeing Hub Gateway
nodes.rationale: Recommended canonical entry students.unimelb.edu.au/health-and-wellbeing as single source of truth for pastoral wellbeing spine

nodes.label: Placement Immunisation & Infection-Control Records (MDHS)
nodes.rationale: Largest single block; faculty-owned by necessity; should be re-tagged out of wellbeing into a placement/clinical-compliance topic

nodes.label: Fitness to Practice Process
nodes.rationale: Governed by University policy MPF1345 but operationalised at faculty level for placement-bearing courses

nodes.label: Special Consideration & Extensions (MPF1326)
nodes.rationale: Academic-relief side of wellbeing anchored to central policy MPF1326; faculty pages restate a centrally-owned process

nodes.label: Pastoral Wellbeing Landing Pages
nodes.rationale: Six faculties (FEIT, Science, FBE, MBS, Law, Education) each maintain a near-identical thin landing page restating central services; clearest consolidation candidate

nodes.label: Wellbeing Ambassador / Peer Programs
nodes.rationale: Peer-led activity that is legitimately local; faculties keep this

nodes.label: Quiet / Wellbeing Physical Spaces
nodes.rationale: Facility-bound and legitimately local (FFAM Southbank quiet spaces, Arts West access)

nodes.label: Biomedical University Health Hub Stub
nodes.rationale: Dead 0-word stub that redirects to MDHS Contact; recommended for deletion

nodes.label: Inclusion & Equity (Topic)
nodes.rationale: One of the smallest topics; tag heavily inflated by false positives, only ~13 of 49 pages are genuine inclusion/equity content

nodes.label: Indigenous Student Support & Success
nodes.rationale: Most legitimate category; appears once per faculty rather than once centrally, each bespoke with none linking to a common hub anchor

nodes.label: Murrup Barak (Indigenous Support Hub)
nodes.rationale: Recommended single authoritative Indigenous student support hub

nodes.label: FEIT Diversity & Inclusion Case Competition
nodes.rationale: One event fragmented into 5 thin pages (landing / How Does It Work / Eligibility / Prizes)

nodes.label: Arts West Building Disability Access
nodes.rationale: Genuinely faculty-owned because buildings are local; appears twice under different URLs (only true intra-faculty duplicate)

nodes.label: MLS Equity-Themed Clinics
nodes.rationale: Discipline-specific curriculum, not a service (Disability Human Rights Clinic, Indigenous Legal Advocacy Clinic, Stateless Legal Clinic, NDIS and Disability Benefits Clinic); legitimately Law-only

nodes.label: NDIS Worker Screening Check
nodes.rationale: Tagged on NDIS/disability keywords but is placement-compliance content belonging to the placements topic (mis-tagged)

nodes.label: Keyword-Match Noise (False Positives)
nodes.rationale: ~22 of 49 pages are false positives: Law GRD researcher bios, ABP/MSD studio archives, FFAM practical-music timetable

nodes.label: Academic Skills (Topic)
nodes.rationale: Small topic with split-and-thin pattern; balance tips toward hub-overlap unlike most topics in the audit

nodes.label: Central Academic Skills Service / Stop 1
nodes.rationale: Textbook cross-cutting service; should be single source of truth for generic study-skills, academic-writing and time-management content

nodes.label: Ian Malkin Centre for Legal Academic Skills
nodes.rationale: Legitimate irreducible core; a named teaching service with its own staff and LMS, not generic advice
nodes.norm_label: ian malkin centre for legal academic skills

nodes.label: Legal Research (Law)
nodes.rationale: 5,424w, by far the deepest page in the topic; can't be centralised because the worked examples are the discipline

nodes.label: Generic Academic Skills Landing Pages
nodes.rationale: Clearest duplication signal; literal title Academic Skills recurs at FEIT (x2), Biomedical (x2), Education; thin restatements of the central service

nodes.label: Peer Mentoring / Peer Assisted Study (PASS)
nodes.rationale: Recurring near-identical pattern across faculties; treat as one university program with a hub page and faculties add only local session times

nodes.label: Academic English / Language Support Tutorials
nodes.rationale: For cohorts with EAL needs, tuned to the discipline's register (Science, FEIT)

nodes.label: Compulsory Quantitative Requirement (FBE)
nodes.rationale: Degree-specific skill gate; legitimately faculty-owned where tied to a program rule
